title: Fixed broken $error()/$info/$warning() on non-generate blocks (within always/initial blocks)
body:
This seems to fix #1084.

It seems I've broken regular $info/$error/$warning tasks, since the lexer always returns TOK_ELAB_TASK for those, so I made the parser accept it for normal tasks as well (and rename it TOK_MSG_TASKS since it no longer applies to elaboration time tasks only).
